name: Lindy leather handbag
description:
The leather shows a visible vertical indentation on the front panel, likely from storage/handling. This is a cosmetic characteristic and does not affect the structure or functionality of the bag. The price has been significantly reduced to reflect this (current retail price is $9900).
Relaxed yet undeniably luxurious, this authentic Hermès Lindy 34 blends effortless structure with supple taurillon clemence texture in a rich brique tone. Designed for comfort and versatility, its distinctive silhouette moves naturally from day to travel with understated confidence. A sophisticated designer companion that balances practicality and elevated style with ease. Date code square O.
SKU0022500
